venues.name: The Restaurant
venues.description: Main dining room with candlelit fine-dining atmosphere, white linens, and china. Open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Menus blend international fare with New Ecuadorian cuisine — ceviche, plantain, locally sourced Galapagos seafood (approximately 90% from local waters). Seating for all 100 guests. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Grill
venues.description: Alfresco poolside restaurant with an enclosable sheltering system for wind and rain. Open for lunch and dinner only (not breakfast). Lunch: Ecuadorian dishes, fresh ceviche, homemade pizza, empanadas, grilled fish, and dark chocolate mousse using Ecuadorian chocolate. Evening: Silversea's Hot Rocks concept — guests cook fresh fish, seafood, and meats on hot lava stones at the table, with daily-changing specials. Complimentary.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour butler-served in-suite dining. Full meals delivered to every suite.
